_comment: IRIS test data — HEM stub. 6 hospital profiles covering major pipeline branch points. Keyed by hospital_id. Loaded by stubs/hem_stub.py.

H001._scenario: Happy path baseline — private Tier-1, NABH Full, Chennai, comprehensive specialty list. Used by most test cases.
H001.name: Apollo Hospitals Chennai

H002._scenario: Public hospital, aspirational district, NQAS accreditation, Tier-2, limited specialties. Tests public hospital document relaxation (CAM Annexure 7) and aspirational district flag.
H002.name: Government Medical College Hospital Tiruchirappalli

H003._scenario: Private Tier-3, no accreditation, only General Surgery and General Medicine empanelled. Tests specialty gate failure (e.g. SB/Orthopaedics not available → zero candidates → USP path).
H003.name: Sri Venkateswara Hospital

H004._scenario: Private hospital in NE state (Assam), Tier-3. Tests NE state enhancement batch override — private hospital in NE gets 5 days/request instead of 2.
H004.name: Guwahati Medical Centre

H005._scenario: Private Tier-2, NABH Entry accreditation, Madurai. Tests mid-tier pricing path and NABH Entry incentive.
H005.name: Meenakshi Mission Hospital Madurai

H006._scenario: Hospital with scheme=cmchis (not pmjay). HARD BLOCK test — Phase 0 must return SCHEME_NOT_SUPPORTED block flag immediately.
H006.name: Christian Medical College Vellore
